name: Chain Hole
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>連鎖空穴</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>チェーン・ホール</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When your opponent activates a monster effect in response to a card or effect activation: Negate that opponent's effect, then, your opponent can banish 1 card from their hand or Deck with the same original name as that negated card. If they did not, you can banish 1 random card from their hand.
eff: When your opponent activates a monster effect in response to a card or effect activation: Negate that opponent's effect, then, your opponent can banish 1 card from their hand or Deck with the same original name as that negated card. If they did not, you can banish 1 random card from their hand.

mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
